principle: Remotion output is reference only. Next-stage clips are generated/edited with already-available AI video tools only, while product truth is preserved from verified UI/source frames.
cost_rule: No new paid subscriptions. Candidate tools must be verified as already owned, already connected, or free/included before production use.
bakeoff_tools: HeyGen if connected account supports required workflow

scenes.goal: premium silent hook frame that works in LinkedIn feed
candidate_tools: existing image generation
Ideogram only if already available
Firefly only if existing access is verified
Runway only if existing access is verified

scenes.goal: cinematic restoration admin chaos: wet carpet, camera roll, paperwork, late-night laptop
candidate_tools: existing image generation plus available editor
Runway only if existing access is verified
Luma only if existing access is verified
Firefly only if existing access is verified
Kling only if existing access and rights are verified

scenes.goal: use verified UI frame as factual plate; enhance camera move/transition outside the UI
candidate_tools: existing/free editor path
CapCut only if already available
Runway only if existing access is verified
Firefly only if existing access is verified

scenes.goal: turn chain-of-custody metadata into premium forensic proof without inventing UI
candidate_tools: existing image generation and editor overlays
Firefly only if existing access is verified
Runway only if existing access is verified
Topaz only if already owned

scenes.goal: make Accept & Start feel tactile and immediate
candidate_tools: existing/free editor path

Firefly only if existing access is verified
